framework.name: Top-Tier Rate Outliers Exist But Are Opaque
framework.description: GLG has no official rate cap and 'rumored to have big name experts charging $5,000/hour,' but no transparency on qualification criteria, industries, or volume of work at that tier. Suggests expert networks support celebrity/unique expertise premium but don't systematize it.
framework.raw_quote: GLG has no official cap on the rates you can charge and is rumored to have a number of big name experts who charge $5,000 for an hour of their time!

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
